item.title: Remember Aitzaz Hasan: at only 15 years old he tackled a suicide bomber who tried entering his school. Sadly, he died but he succeeded in saving hundreds of his fellow school mates.

item.title: It Feel Like Summer
item.description: Every day gets hotter than the one before. Heatwave in the Southern US and 100 °F where I’m at. Stay hydrated folks. Photographer Jamie Beck perfectly captures the sweltering heat of the season with this cinemgraph from her Provence self-portrait series. Summertime soundtrack by Childish Gambino EDIT - Had to delete and repost, something happened to the clip and turned it into a still photo smh

item.title: When you’re fast, you’re not slow dump
item.description:
Seriously hate that
If you haven’t read the email, Google it
I agree Clint,
?
?‍?
It is fun to wear walnut beads during Mardi Gras for this exact reason
!!!
Cousins!!!!
!?!?!
Frick, it is so fricking hawt down here rn
Like totally
Running up that Hill - Sophia Bush
Song ID at top
so interesting oh, Alicia Keys - Falling
Is this fake????!!!!!
Heh
Hakuna Matata
Immediately
Peace out y’all xo
